title: 10 best herbal teas for angina
description: Tilia platyphyllos, also known as broad-leaved lime, teas helps with angina because of its anti-inflammatory and vasodilatory properties. The flavonoids and terpenoids present in the tea help to relax blood vessels and improve blood flow to the heart, reducing the frequency and severity of angina attacks. Additionally, the tea's antioxidant properties help to protect the heart and blood vessels from oxidative stress, promoting overall cardiovascular health and reducing the risk of hear...
